overall.description: A cinematic game engine shot from a fantasy RPG showing two characters sitting on stone steps overlooking a snow-covered medieval town square. The scene features ambient pedestrian activity, historic stone architecture with snow-laden roofs, and distant mountains under an overcast winter sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered medieval town square with stone architecture

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a snow-covered medieval town square. Two characters sit on steps in the foreground observing the scene, while a person in yellow stands in the plaza and other pedestrians walk through the distant square. Historic stone buildings with snow-laden roofs and distant mountains complete the winter atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic vista of a snow-covered medieval town square that maintains a serene and wintry atmosphere. It begins with a focus on two characters sitting on stone steps in the foreground, who quietly observe the activity of the plaza below. As the eye wanders into the midground, the scene reveals a person dressed in yellow standing amidst other pedestrians drifting through the square. The view then expands to encompass the surrounding historic stone buildings with snow-laden roofs, finally settling on the distant, jagged mountains under an overcast winter sky.
